name: example.context_snapshot
description: Reference plugin that declares a read-only context snapshot capability.

capabilities.name: context.snapshot
capabilities.description: Expose a host-provided context snapshot as a deterministic plugin capability.

permissions.name: context.read
permissions.reason: Required to read host context through the Runtime API boundary.

permissions.name: trace.read
permissions.reason: Required to make context snapshots traceable and replay-safe.
